Contents: I just joined a chat for a game and walked into a brick wall of sad feels and I am literally laughing at how awkward I felt trying to decide what to say since I just joined and in sure yall were notified in some way. XD
Okay so I don't want to be insensitive and I'm sorry for all your losses. I know how difficult the loss, change, and emotional pain can be to deal with and it sucks. That being said.....
